positive: An intricate, highly detailed design featuring stylized mythical flora and woodland creatures, such as geometric forest sprites, glowing mushrooms, and leaping hares, rendered in a stylized Art Deco/Neo-Whimsy aesthetic. The composition must be central, designed as a seamless, high-contrast repeating pattern suitable for apparel printing. Use bold, clean silhouettes and elegant, flowing lines. The color palette should be rich emerald green, deep sapphire blue, burnished gold, and complementary ivory white. Lighting should be ethereal and dramatic, emphasizing depth and strong, graphic contrast. Vector illustration quality, symmetrical composition, highly graphic, clean lines, sticker style, Zazzle artwork.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, messy lines, grain, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, tiling issues, amateur drawing, dirty
